# PHIL.191 ? Measure What Matters

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** operating_principles
**Subcategory:** measure_what_matters
**Domain:** OPERATING_PRINCIPLES
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Track metrics that actually drive business outcomes

## Application
Define key metrics, avoid vanity metrics, measure leading indicators, act on data
